api_key.description: Nexio Pay API key, used as the Basic auth password. Never logged.

username.description: Nexio Pay API username, used as the Basic auth username. Part of the credential pair; never logged.

base_url.description: Nexio Pay API base URL override for tests, proxies, or a non-default subdomain.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
